summary: Frontend testing of Enhanced Purchase Invoices module completed. All new BIJNISBOOKS-style features are working correctly: per-item GST%, Discount%, Freight, Description fields, invoice-level freight/other charges, and detailed summary panel with auto-calculations.

issues: Invoice detail view doesn't display new line item fields (GST%, Discount%, Freight, Description) - only shows Item, Qty, Rate, Amount. Consider enhancing to show all saved line item details.

passed_tests: Purchase Invoice form loads with all new fields
Add line item shows: Product, Qty, Rate, Disc%, GST%, Freight, Description fields
Summary panel shows: Subtotal, Discount, GST, Item Freight, Invoice Freight, Other Charges, Grand Total
Auto-calculation works correctly when qty/rate/discount/gst/freight change
Multiple line items can be added with individual calculations
Invoice-level Freight and Other Charges fields work correctly
Create purchase invoice with all new fields - saves successfully
Invoice displays correctly in the list with correct amount
View invoice details shows basic line item information
action_items: OPTIONAL: Enhance Invoice Details modal to display all line item fields (GST%, Discount%, Freight, Description) for complete visibility
seed_data_creation: Created test purchase invoice PUR-000002 with BELT product
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Invoices module enhanced with BIJNISBOOKS features. All new fields working: per-item GST% (0/5/12/18/28%), Discount%, Freight, Description. Invoice-level freight and other charges. Summary panel with auto-calculations. Minor enhancement opportunity: Invoice detail view could show all line item fields.

summary_panel.item_freight: Working - sum of all line item freights

calculations.grand_total: Correct: subtotal - discount + gst + item_freight + invoice_freight + other_charges
